head0c242gc705g45cfg997fg8397ee2f91b6: I tortured a man - and for nothing.
h19a7064dga0abg44bagbb74g26ae90c6d18a: Mizora, where are you? Answer me, dammit!
h8049a54cgad8bg41d6gbddbgad0b8186695b: *Your minds connect - and you see the same devilish face you'd seen when you first met Wyll.*
h97d0f42fg93e4g485fgb152g6f388b34184d: Look - you want answers. But it's not the time or the place.
h5fb529fbg230ag4a5agaa13g52b106572761: We'll talk in camp when I'm ready. And I'll tell you what you want to know.
h1858099cga141g47afgb050g106bacb9cc91: *An unknown face commands your mind - blue skin, gnarled horns. And then you are yourself once more.*
hd0cefe04gd332g4e5bg9364g4543e88034e3: We tortured a man - and for nothing.
